## Gate-4 UAT PR (Required)

### Required Links (must be non-empty)
- Evidence dashboard URL: `https://brunogaosz.github.io/ljwx-deploy/`
- Prior gate PR URL (Gate-3):
- UAT plan URL:
- UAT result URL:

### Strict Checklist (all required)
- [ ] UAT matrix covers all acceptance criteria.
- [ ] Defects are triaged with severity/owner.
- [ ] Waivers are explicitly approved.
- [ ] Product owner sign-off is recorded.
- [ ] UAT evidence link is attached.

### Blocking Rule
PR must not merge until every checkbox is checked and required links are filled.
